chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-354 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on non prosecution. ------ 21.05.2025 Mr. Razi Khan Nabi Bux R. Chandio, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh a/w Inspector Meeran Khan Durrani, Incharge CIA, Kamber, Inspector Ashique Hussain Chandio, on behalf of DIGP, Larkana Range, Inspector Ali Hassan Mahar, S.H.O. P.S. Behram, P.C. Ahmed Sultan, P.C Shabir Magsi and PC Nadeem Brohi. ------ Though office has listed instant petition for non prosecution; however, counsel for the petitioner under the cover of his statement dated 21.05.2025 files copies of F.I.R. No.11/2025, registered with Police Station Hatri Ghulam Shah and F.I.R. No.08/2025, registered with Police Station S.I.B Siyal and submits that since the alleged detenues have been surfaced, therefore, purpose of instant petition has been served and seeks its disposal. Learned Assistant Advocate General also files statements alongwith certain copies, which are also taken on record and raised no objection for disposal of instant petition. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
